expected_result: DNS resolves to the VPS public IPv4 before starting Caddy certificate issuance
why_it_matters: Caddy can only obtain a public certificate when the domain points to the server and reaches ports 80/443.

check: Allow tcp/22 from admin IP range
expected_result: SSH remains available for controlled administration
why_it_matters: A VPS needs administrative access, but broad SSH exposure should be narrowed when possible.

expected_result: HTTP ACME challenge and HTTP-to-HTTPS redirects can reach Caddy
why_it_matters: Caddy automatic HTTPS uses HTTP port 80 for redirects and common ACME flows.

expected_result: Users and webhook providers reach n8n through HTTPS
why_it_matters: Production webhook callbacks must use HTTPS.

check: Do not allow tcp/5678 from the internet
expected_result: n8n is reachable only through Caddy reverse proxy
why_it_matters: Direct public n8n port exposure bypasses the proxy boundary and makes webhook URL mistakes more likely.

check: Do not allow tcp/5432 from the internet
expected_result: PostgreSQL is only reachable on the internal Docker network
why_it_matters: Database exposure is not required for this architecture and increases risk.

expected_result: Rendered Compose config contains caddy, n8n, postgres, volumes, networks, and expected env vars
why_it_matters: A valid Compose graph is the minimum deployability check before touching a VPS.

expected_result: Caddy accepts n8n.example.com and reverse_proxy n8n:5678
why_it_matters: Caddy syntax errors would block HTTPS and webhook delivery.

check: curl -I https://n8n.example.com returns 200 or 302 from n8n
expected_result: TLS terminates at Caddy and traffic reaches n8n
why_it_matters: A browser loading the editor is not enough; webhook providers also need a reachable public endpoint.

expected_result: Production webhook URL and editor URL do not show localhost
why_it_matters: OAuth callback and webhook providers must not be configured with localhost.

expected_result: n8n trusts the immediate reverse proxy hop
why_it_matters: Forwarded protocol and host data should represent the original HTTPS request.

check: n8n_data, postgres_data, caddy_data, and caddy_config volumes exist
expected_result: Workflows, credentials, database state, and Caddy certificates survive container replacement
why_it_matters: Production-like deployment requires persistence across updates and restarts.
